text.title: nodejs-patterns Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure from inputs to a validated scaffold-spec output. Each step has an input artefact, an action, and an output artefact consumed by the next step.

step.name: collect-inputs
step.input: Product brief listing the resources (users, products, …) + the chosen auth_mode + Node engines field from package.json.
step.action: Read the Prerequisites table from AGENTS.md. Confirm every artefact is present; reject if any input is missing.
step.output: Validated inputs object: {service_name, node_version, resources[], auth_mode}.

step.name: emit-folder-tree
step.action: Expand the canonical folder template (templates/create-app.ts neighbourhood) for each resource: routes/<r>.ts, controllers/<r>.controller.ts, services/<r>.service.ts. Add middleware/auth.ts only when auth_mode != "none".
step.decision-gate: If auth_mode is "jwt", folder_tree MUST include src/middleware/auth.ts. If absent, fail step 2.

step.name: emit-middleware-order
step.action: Produce middleware_order using rule r1-middleware-order from 01-core-rules.xml. Insert "auth" between "requestLogger" and "routes" when auth_mode != "none".
step.output: middleware_order: string[] satisfying schema enum and ending with "errorHandler".
step.decision-gate: Reject any order where errorHandler is not the last element.

step.name: emit-error-classes
step.action: Emit error_classes array with mandatory base AppError plus NotFoundError, ValidationError. Add UnauthorizedError iff auth_mode != "none".
step.output: error_classes: array of ≥ 2 entries with statusCode in 400–599.

step.name: emit-logger-config
step.action: Pick library: "pino" (default for ≥ Node 20). Set request_id_header to "x-request-id".

step.name: assemble-and-validate
step.action: Assemble the JSON document. Run scripts/validate-nodejs-patterns.py on the file. If validation fails, print violations and re-run the failed step.
step.output: scaffold-spec.json that exits 0 from the validator.
step.decision-gate: If validator returns non-zero, do not return the spec to the caller. Re-run from the failed step.
